mapper.sql:
AA.MEMB_SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID , AA.MEMB_TYPE , AA.PTN_SEQ
, AA.MEMB_NAME , AA.NICKNAME , AA.PHONE , AA.EMAIL , AA.EMAIL_YN , AA.MESSAGE_YN , AA.JOIN_DTTM , AA.USE_YN
, AA.RGTR , AA.RGT_DTTM , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RGT_DATE , AA.CHNR , AA.CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* mapper.member.com.erns.coching.MemberDAO.getListCount */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MEMB_INF AA INNER JOIN T_PARTNER_INF BB ON AA.PTN_SEQ = BB.PTN_SEQ
AND AA.WTDR_YN = 'N'

/* mapper.member.com.erns.coching.MemberDAO.load */
SELECT
FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND AA.WTDR_YN = 'N'
